summary: The investigation into the claim that Sundas "Sunny" Naqvi was falsely claimed to have been detained by ICE at the Dodge County Jail, and that this claim was amplified by Cook County Commissioner Kevin Morrison, is inconclusive. This is due to persistent limitations with the web search tool, which returned no results for any queries. Consequently, no primary or secondary research could be conducted to verify any part of the claim or its attribution.
key_finding: The web search tool consistently returned empty results, preventing any fact-checking or evidence gathering for the claim.
